description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a skeletonized stock and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of a long barrel. The body is primarily matte black with some dark brown or reddish accents, likely representing a polymer or composite lower receiver and a metal upper receiver. The rifle includes a thumbhole stock for ergonomic handling and a detachable box magazine, partially visible beneath the receiver. The top of the rifle is equipped with iron sights, and the overall build suggests a focus on lightweight maneuverability and reduced recoil. The suppressor at the muzzle end is cylindrical and extends the length of the barrel, indicating a design for stealth or noise reduction. The rifle's surfaces are hard and smooth, with a slight sheen, typical of modern tactical firearms.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a skeletonized thumbhole stock, long barrel with suppressor, and iron sights, finished in matte black with dark accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, skeletonized stock, thumbhole grip, detachable magazine, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular suppressor opening and narrow barrel profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock, magazine, and suppressor details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's open structure and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
